Gather

Memories that evoke a lifetime.

Perched atop the highest point in Old Harbor overlooking town and the ocean beyond, the Atlantic Inn sits in a peaceful setting on manicured grounds. Six acres of rolling lawns. Carefully tended gardens. Stunning water views and fresh ocean breezes.

Wedding events here are impeccably curated with distinctive packages and the exclusivity couples and their guests are looking for — the entire property is reserved for you.

Weddings

A special day, held in a special place.

From the rolling lawns to the wraparound veranda, the entire Atlantic Inn becomes yours alone for your wedding weekend. Our staff of experts will guide you in the planning process to create a celebration that will evoke memories for a lifetime.

Award-winning food. Majestic location. The privacy of the whole property for the sole use of your party.

Request a Proposal

Meetings & Events

Discreet, attentive, impeccable.

From our private meeting room located in a separate out-building from the Inn to the simple elegance of the Veranda, the Atlantic Inn has always enjoyed an impeccable reputation. Service is discreet and attentive.

Internet, overhead projector, flip charts, and other audio-visual and video rental services available. Full-service event catering customized to your needs.
